name: kitemcp-portfolio-intelligence
description: AI-powered portfolio intelligence for Indian equity markets (NSE/BSE)

scripts.help:
node -e "console.log('
Available Commands:
 npm start		Run full daily workflow
 npm run check	Check gate status
 npm run dashboard	Quick CLI portfolio summary
 npm run report	Generate daily Markdown report
 npm run export	Generate portfolio Excel
 npm run web		Start web dashboard
')"
